greeting: Hello, this is [Business Name]. How can I assist you?
transfer: If you need to speak with Ben, I can transfer the call. Please hold for just a moment.
fallback: I'm not sure I understand your question. Can you please provide more context?
office_hours_response: Our office hours are Monday to Friday, 8:30 AM to 5:00 PM.
after_hours_response: We are currently closed. If this is an emergency for G&M Pressure Washing properties, please let me know and I will transfer the call.
service_call_fee_response: Our service call fee is $115, and our hourly rate is $98.
hourly_rate_response: Our hourly rate is $98, billed in half-hour increments.
